metadata.description: Grimoire — AI-native consulting workspace for the Rattle product configurator and technical-documentation system (rattleapp.de). Skills, subagents, slash commands, JSON Schemas, and golden I/O examples that teach any AI model how to produce correct, BOM-aware product configurations and CE-compliant technical documentations on the Rattle SaaS platform.

plugins.name: grimoire
plugins.description: Twelve Anthropic-format skills (rattle-configurator, rattle-api, rattle-pricelist-analysis, rattle-suggest-config, rattle-document-templates, rattle-techdoc, rattle-safety-notices, rattle-ghs-statements, rattle-techdoc-language, rattle-apply-config, rattle-audit, rattle-tenant-memory), five subagents (rattle-consultant, rattle-auditor, rattle-config-builder, rattle-techdoc-author, rattle-techdoc-auditor), six slash commands (/rattle-analyse, /rattle-audit, /rattle-suggest-config, /rattle-build-offer, /rattle-build-techdoc, /rattle-audit-techdoc), JSON Schemas for every output contract, and golden I/O examples. Encodes the #1 configurator rule, 12 configuration rules, 4 anti-patterns, 6 configurator structural checks, 7 idempotent ensure_* operation types, the 15-chapter normative technical-documentation structure (DIN EN ISO 20607, IEC/IEEE 82079-1, MRL/MVO), 12 technical-doc audit checks, EditorJS safety_notice + hp_statement contracts, 31-locale signal-word catalogue, 24-locale CLP H/P/EUH catalogue, ISO 7010 + GHS pictogram catalogues, and the IEC/IEEE 82079-1 §7 quality criteria.
